description: Registry of localization_zoo method families. Tier and status are docs-facing classifications; they do not change runtime behavior. Update entries when a family graduates between tiers or when its maintenance status changes.

tier_definitions.core: Primary baselines that must stay green on the primary budget profile. Featured on leaderboards and in paper-comparison docs.
tier_definitions.extended: Maintained but not first-class on the primary leaderboard. Kept for catalog breadth and comparative study.

status_definitions.maintained: Has a known-green manifest within the last documented refresh.
status_definitions.timeout_prone: Frequently exceeds the practical_full_300s profile; reported under extended profile or with explicit timeout_budget status.
status_definitions.input_constrained: Needs sensors or calibration not present in every dataset (e.g. camera intrinsics).
status_definitions.legacy: Kept available for reproducibility of older comparisons; not actively tuned.
status_definitions.experimental: Recent addition; contract verified but not yet routinely benchmarked.

ct_icp.notes: Paper-oriented continuous-time core; main reproducibility target alongside LiTAMIN2.

litamin2.notes: Paper-oriented front-end; KITTI Raw 0009 RPE indicative result available.

ct_lio.notes: Custom continuous-time LIO integration; not a single-paper reproduction.

okvis.notes: Stereo-VIO baseline; primary camera-aware family for the practical profile.

vins_fusion.notes: VINS-Fusion VIO; completes KITTI Raw windows in the practical profile.

fast_livo2.notes: FAST-LIVO2 LiDAR-inertial-visual; completes KITTI Raw windows in the practical profile.

orb_slam3.notes: Heavy under practical_full_300s; report under extended_full_1800s where applicable.

lvi_sam.notes: Practical-budget timeouts on KITTI Raw 200/full; finishes 0061_200 fast at ~0.5-0.6 FPS.

r2live.notes: Practical-budget timeouts; finishes 0061_200 fast at ~0.5-0.6 FPS.
